title: scleranthus delortii
intro: Scleranthus delortii, also known as Delort's knotgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health. Scleranthus delortii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
